Config.UseMod.Name: Enable Mod
Config.ShowInfo.Name: Display Info Board
Config.ShowInfo.Tooltip: Show the material breakdown board next to the menu.
Config.UseBasePrice.Name: Use Base Material Prices
Config.UseBasePrice.Tooltip: If enabled, materials always cost their base value. If disabled, costs adjust based on your professions.
Config.PriceIncreaseRate.Name: Price Increase Rate
Config.PriceIncreaseRate.Tooltip: Sets the markup rate applied to the total material cost. 0 means no increase; 1 doubles the total.
